strengths: 20 years of diverse engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure, and low-latency systems demonstrates genuine technical breadth.
Entrepreneurial background (GISCollective founder) combined with a track record of public knowledge-sharing (conference talks, full-day workshops) shows some leadership and community presence.
Recent work at re:cinq on MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks provides at least surface-level exposure to applied AI infrastructure.
concerns: AI involvement is limited to tooling and scaffolding for agent workflows — no demonstrated depth in AI/ML strategy, model development, or recognized expertise in the field.

The role is a director-level IC requiring strategic customer advisory and internal influence at an organizational level; the resume shows no evidence of this type of leadership or executive-facing engagement.
Only a Bachelor's in CS; no advanced degree in AI, ML, or a related technical field as strongly preferred by the role.
response.justification: Despite two decades of hands-on engineering across a wide range of domains, the candidate lacks the AI depth, recognized thought leadership, and director-level strategic influence this role demands. The most recent AI-adjacent work amounts to developer tooling scaffolding rather than AI strategy, product design, or advisory at scale. There is no evidence of advising enterprise customers, shaping AI platform direction, or operating at the cross-functional, executive-adjacent level the job description requires. The candidate is a capable senior-to-staff IC, but the profile does not align with a Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) mandate.
